results.question: 张三的房租是多少钱一个月？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  租赁类型,
  租客姓名,
  联系电话,
  原始租金,
  价格类型,
  折算月租金,
  租赁开始时间,
  租赁结束时间,
  房间ID
FROM (
  SELECT
    '整租' AS 租赁类型,
    tenants_name AS 租客姓名,
    phone AS 联系电话,
    lease_price AS 原始租金,
    CASE
      WHEN square_type = 1 THEN '元每月'
      WHEN square_type = 4 THEN '元每天'
      ELSE CONCAT('类型', square_type)
    END AS 价格类型,
    CASE
      WHEN square_type = 1 THEN lease_price
      WHEN square_type = 4 THEN COALESCE(daily_prices, lease_price) * 30
      ELSE NULL
    END AS 折算月租金,
    lease_starttime AS 租赁开始时间,
    lease_endtime AS 租赁结束时间,
    room_id AS 房间ID
  FROM qft_whole_tenants
  WHERE company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(is_delete,0) = 0
    AND tenants_name = '张三'
    AND NOW() BETWEEN lease_starttime AND lease_endtime

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    '合租' AS 租赁类型,
    tenants_name AS 租客姓名,
    phone AS 联系电话,
    lease_price AS 原始租金,
    CASE
      WHEN square_type = 1 THEN '元每月'
      WHEN square_type = 2 THEN '元/㎡/月'
      WHEN square_type = 4 THEN '元每天'
      ELSE CONCAT('类型', square_type)
    END AS 价格类型,
    CASE
      WHEN square_type = 1 THEN lease_price
      WHEN square_type = 4 THEN COALESCE(daily_prices, lease_price) * 30
      ELSE NULL
    END AS 折算月租金,
    lease_starttime AS 租赁开始时间,
    lease_endtime AS 租赁结束时间,
    room_id AS 房间ID
  FROM qft_joint_tenants
  WHERE company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(is_delete,0) = 0
    AND tenants_name = '张三'
    AND NOW() BETWEEN lease_starttime AND lease_endtime
) t
ORDER BY 8 DESC;

results.question: 合租这边每个门店的出租率是多少？

  s.name AS store_name,
  IFNULL(j.total_room_count, 0) AS total_joint_room_count,

results.question: 所有整租房源的收房价和出房价差价是多少？哪套赚得最多？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  t.id,
  t.house_code,
  t.building,
  t.unit_name,
  t.door_number,
  t.receive_price,
  t.out_price,
  t.profit_diff,
  DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY t.profit_diff DESC) AS profit_rank
FROM (
  SELECT
    id,
    house_code,
    building,
    unit_name,
    door_number,
    ROUND(IFNULL(joe_price, 0), 2) AS receive_price,
    ROUND(
      CASE
        WHEN square_price IS NULL THEN NULL
        WHEN IFNULL(square_type, 0) = 2 AND inside_space IS NOT NULL THEN square_price * inside_space
        WHEN IFNULL(square_type, 0) = 2 AND inside_space IS NULL THEN NULL
        ELSE square_price
      END,
      2
    ) AS out_price,
    ROUND(
      CASE
        WHEN square_price IS NULL THEN NULL
        WHEN IFNULL(square_type, 0) = 2 AND inside_space IS NOT NULL THEN square_price * inside_space - IFNULL(joe_price, 0)
        WHEN IFNULL(square_type, 0) = 2 AND inside_space IS NULL THEN NULL
        ELSE square_price - IFNULL(joe_price, 0)
      END,
      2
    ) AS profit_diff
  FROM qft_whole_housing
  WHERE company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
) t
ORDER BY t.profit_diff DESC, t.id ASC;

results.question: 整租那边今年一共收到了多少租金？按季度统计一下。
results.generated_sql:
WITH rent_data AS (
    SELECT
        QUARTER(real_pay_date) AS quarter_no,
        real_money
    FROM qft_joint_tenants_income
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND business_type = 2
      AND IFNULL(is_history, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(is_deposit, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(transfer_status, 0) <> 1
      AND real_pay_date IS NOT NULL
      AND real_money > 0
      AND YEAR(real_pay_date) = YEAR(CURDATE())
)
SELECT
    period,
    received_rent
FROM (
    SELECT
        CONCAT('Q', quarter_no) AS period,
        quarter_no AS sort_no,
        SUM(real_money) AS received_rent
    FROM rent_data
    GROUP BY quarter_no

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        '合计' AS period,
        5 AS sort_no,
        SUM(real_money) AS received_rent
    FROM rent_data
) t
ORDER BY sort_no;

results.question: 整租应支和合租应收总共欠了多少钱？哪边欠的多？
results.generated_sql:
WITH whole AS (
    SELECT IFNULL(SUM(IFNULL(arrear_money, 0)), 0) AS whole_expend_debt
    FROM qft_whole_bill_expend
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(is_history, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(arrear_money, 0) > 0
),
joint AS (
    SELECT IFNULL(SUM(IFNULL(debt_money, 0)), 0) AS joint_income_debt
    FROM qft_joint_tenants_income
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(is_history, 0) = 0
      AND business_type = 3
      AND IFNULL(debt_money, 0) > 0
)
SELECT
    whole.whole_expend_debt AS whole_expend_debt,
    joint.joint_income_debt AS joint_income_debt,
    whole.whole_expend_debt + joint.joint_income_debt AS total_debt,
    CASE
        WHEN whole.whole_expend_debt > joint.joint_income_debt THEN '整租应支欠得多'
        WHEN whole.whole_expend_debt < joint.joint_income_debt THEN '合租应收欠得多'
        ELSE '两边一样多'
    END AS more_debt_side,
    ABS(whole.whole_expend_debt - joint.joint_income_debt) AS debt_diff
FROM whole, joint;

WITH latest_room AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT
            r.*,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY r.housing_id ORDER BY r.id DESC) AS rn
        FROM qft_whole_room r
        WHERE r.company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
    ) x
    WHERE x.rn = 1
),
latest_tenant AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT
            t.*,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.room_id ORDER BY t.id DESC) AS rn
        FROM qft_whole_tenants t
        WHERE t.company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(t.is_delete, 0) = 0
    ) x
    WHERE x.rn = 1
)
SELECT
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        ORDER BY CASE WHEN lt.id IS NOT NULL THEN lt.lease_price - h.joe_price END DESC, h.id
    ) AS profit_rank,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN lt.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) OVER () AS rented_housing_count,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN lt.id IS NOT NULL THEN lt.lease_price - h.joe_price ELSE 0 END) OVER (), 2) AS total_price_diff,
    h.id AS housing_id,
    h.house_code,
    CONCAT(IFNULL(ap.property_adrr, ''), IFNULL(h.building, ''), IFNULL(h.unit_name, ''), IFNULL(h.door_number, '')) AS house_address,
    h.housing_name AS landlord_name,
    lt.tenants_name AS tenant_name,
    h.joe_price AS in_price,
    lt.lease_price AS out_price,
    ROUND(CASE WHEN lt.id IS NOT NULL THEN lt.lease_price - h.joe_price END, 2) AS price_diff
FROM qft_whole_housing h
LEFT JOIN latest_room lr
    ON lr.housing_id = h.id
LEFT JOIN latest_tenant lt
    ON lt.room_id = lr.id
LEFT JOIN qft_area_property ap
    ON ap.id = h.property_adrr
   AND ap.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
WHERE h.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND IFNULL(h.is_check_out, 0) = 0
ORDER BY price_diff DESC, h.id;

WITH quarter_dim AS (
    SELECT 1 AS quarter_num
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 2
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 3
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 4
),
rent_receipt AS (
    SELECT
        QUARTER(f.account_date) AS quarter_num,
        SUM(
            CASE
                WHEN IFNULL(jti.final_money, 0) > 0 THEN f.money * IFNULL(jti.house_money, 0) / jti.final_money
                ELSE 0
            END
        ) AS received_rent_money
    FROM qft_finance f
    JOIN qft_joint_tenants_income jti
        ON f.source_id = jti.id
       AND jti.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(jti.is_delete, 0) = 0
       AND IFNULL(jti.business_type, 0) = 2
       AND IFNULL(jti.is_deposit, 0) = 0
    WHERE f.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(f.nature, 0) = 1
      AND IFNULL(f.cashier, 0) = 1
      AND IFNULL(f.source_type, 0) = 2
      AND f.account_date >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-01-01')
      AND f.account_date < DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-01-01'), INTERVAL 1 YEAR)
    GROUP BY QUARTER(f.account_date)
)
SELECT
    CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '-Q', q.quarter_num) AS `季度`,
    ROUND(IFNULL(r.received_rent_money, 0), 2) AS `实收租金`
FROM quarter_dim q
LEFT JOIN rent_receipt r
    ON q.quarter_num = r.quarter_num
UNION ALL
SELECT
    '合计' AS `季度`,
    ROUND(IFNULL(SUM(r.received_rent_money), 0), 2) AS `实收租金`
FROM rent_receipt r;

results.generated_sql:
WITH latest_receive AS (
    SELECT
        chr.housing_id,
        chr.housing_money AS receive_price,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY chr.housing_id
            ORDER BY chr.start_time DESC, chr.id DESC
        ) AS rn
    FROM qft_common_housing_renewal chr
    WHERE chr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(chr.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND chr.business_type = 2
      AND NOW() BETWEEN chr.start_time AND chr.end_time
),
latest_rent AS (
    SELECT
        ctr.housing_id,
        ctr.room_money AS rent_price,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY ctr.housing_id
            ORDER BY ctr.start_time DESC, ctr.id DESC
        ) AS rn
    FROM qft_common_tenant_renewal ctr
    WHERE ctr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(ctr.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND ctr.business_type = 2
      AND NOW() BETWEEN ctr.start_time AND ctr.end_time
),
whole_housing AS (
    SELECT
        h.id AS housing_id,
        h.house_code,
        h.building,
        h.unit_name,
        MIN(pr.room_number) AS room_number
    FROM qft_focus_housing h
    LEFT JOIN qft_focus_parent_room pr
        ON pr.housing_id = h.id
       AND pr.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(pr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    WHERE h.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(h.is_check_out, 0) = 0
    GROUP BY
        h.id,
        h.house_code,
        h.building,
        h.unit_name
),
price_diff_data AS (
    SELECT
        wh.housing_id,
        wh.house_code,
        wh.building,
        wh.unit_name,
        wh.room_number,
        lr.receive_price,
        lt.rent_price,
        lt.rent_price - lr.receive_price AS price_diff
    FROM whole_housing wh
    JOIN latest_receive lr
        ON lr.housing_id = wh.housing_id
       AND lr.rn = 1
    JOIN latest_rent lt
        ON lt.housing_id = wh.housing_id
       AND lt.rn = 1
)
SELECT
    housing_id,
    house_code,
    building,
    unit_name,
    room_number,
    receive_price,
    rent_price,
    price_diff,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY price_diff DESC) AS profit_rank,
    CASE
        WHEN DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY price_diff DESC) = 1 THEN 1
        ELSE 0
    END AS is_max_profit
FROM price_diff_data
ORDER BY price_diff DESC, housing_id;

quarters AS (

    UNION ALL SELECT 4

SELECT

    total_received_rent

        ON q.quarter_num = qd.quarter_num

) t

WITH tenant_mode AS (
    SELECT
        jti.tenants_id,
        jti.business_type,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY jti.tenants_id
            ORDER BY jti.log_index DESC, jti.pay_count DESC, jti.create_time DESC, jti.id DESC
        ) AS rn
    FROM qft_joint_tenants_income jti
    WHERE jti.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(jti.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND jti.business_type IN (2, 3)
),
tenant_rent AS (
    SELECT
        tm.business_type,
        jt.id AS tenant_id,
        jt.tenants_name AS tenant_name,
        jt.phone,
        jt.lease_price AS monthly_rent
    FROM tenant_mode tm
    JOIN qft_joint_tenants jt
      ON tm.tenants_id = jt.id
    WHERE tm.rn = 1
      AND jt.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(jt.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND jt.lease_price IS NOT NULL
),
ranked AS (
    SELECT
        business_type,
        tenant_id,
        tenant_name,
        phone,
        monthly_rent,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY business_type ORDER BY monthly_rent DESC) AS max_rank,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY business_type ORDER BY monthly_rent ASC) AS min_rank
    FROM tenant_rent
),
result AS (
    SELECT
        business_type,
        '最贵' AS rent_rank,
        tenant_id,
        tenant_name,
        phone,
        monthly_rent
    FROM ranked
    WHERE max_rank = 1
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        business_type,
        '最便宜' AS rent_rank,
        tenant_id,
        tenant_name,
        phone,
        monthly_rent
    FROM ranked
    WHERE min_rank = 1
)
SELECT
    CASE business_type WHEN 2 THEN '整租' WHEN 3 THEN '合租' END AS business_type_name,
    rent_rank,
    tenant_id,
    tenant_name,
    phone,
    monthly_rent
FROM result

WITH latest_room AS (
    SELECT
        r.id,
        r.housing_id,
        r.room_number,
        r.pricing_money,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY r.housing_id ORDER BY r.id DESC) AS rn
    FROM qft_focus_room r
    WHERE r.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
),
latest_housing_renewal AS (
    SELECT
        hr.housing_id,
        hr.housing_money,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY hr.housing_id ORDER BY hr.start_time DESC, hr.id DESC) AS rn
    FROM qft_common_housing_renewal hr
    WHERE hr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(hr.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND hr.business_type = 2
),
latest_tenant_renewal AS (
    SELECT
        tr.housing_id,
        tr.room_id,
        tr.room_money,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY tr.housing_id, tr.room_id ORDER BY tr.start_time DESC, tr.id DESC) AS rn
    FROM qft_common_tenant_renewal tr
    WHERE tr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(tr.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND tr.business_type = 2
),
housing_profit AS (
    SELECT
        h.id AS housing_id,
        h.house_code,
        h.building,
        h.unit_name,
        lr.room_number,
        COALESCE(lhr.housing_money, ft.joe_price, 0) AS purchase_price,
        COALESCE(ltr.room_money, lr.pricing_money, 0) AS rent_price,
        COALESCE(ltr.room_money, lr.pricing_money, 0) - COALESCE(lhr.housing_money, ft.joe_price, 0) AS price_diff
    FROM qft_focus_housing h
    INNER JOIN qft_butler b
        ON b.housing_id = h.id
       AND b.company_id = 1001
       AND b.businessType = 2
    LEFT JOIN latest_room lr
        ON lr.housing_id = h.id
       AND lr.rn = 1
    LEFT JOIN qft_focus_trust ft
        ON h.trust_id = ft.id
    LEFT JOIN latest_housing_renewal lhr
        ON lhr.housing_id = h.id
       AND lhr.rn = 1
    LEFT JOIN latest_tenant_renewal ltr
        ON ltr.housing_id = h.id
       AND ltr.room_id = lr.id
       AND ltr.rn = 1
    WHERE h.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
)
SELECT
    t.housing_id,
    t.house_code,
    t.building,
    t.unit_name,
    t.room_number,
    t.purchase_price AS 收房价,
    t.rent_price AS 出房价,
    t.price_diff AS 差价,
    t.profit_rank AS 赚钱排名,
    CASE WHEN t.profit_rank = 1 THEN '是' ELSE '否' END AS 是否赚得最多
FROM (
    SELECT
        hp.*,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY hp.price_diff DESC) AS profit_rank
    FROM housing_profit hp
) t
ORDER BY t.price_diff DESC, t.housing_id ASC;

    FROM quarters

quarter_stats AS (
    SELECT
        QUARTER(f.account_date) AS quarter_no,
        ROUND(SUM(fi.real_money), 2) AS rent_received
    FROM qft_finance f
    JOIN qft_finance_item fi
        ON fi.finance_id = f.id
       AND fi.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(fi.is_delete, 0) = 0
       AND fi.nature = 1
    JOIN qft_common_tenant_renewal ctr
        ON f.tenant_id = ctr.id
       AND ctr.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(ctr.is_delete, 0) = 0
       AND ctr.business_type = 2
    WHERE f.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND f.nature = 1
      AND f.cashier = 1
      AND f.source_type = 2
      AND f.account_date >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-01-01')
      AND f.account_date < DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 YEAR), '%Y-01-01')
    GROUP BY QUARTER(f.account_date)
)
SELECT quarter, rent_received
FROM (
    SELECT
        q.quarter_no AS sort_no,
        CONCAT('Q', q.quarter_no) AS quarter,
        COALESCE(qs.rent_received, 0.00) AS rent_received
    FROM quarters q
    LEFT JOIN quarter_stats qs
        ON q.quarter_no = qs.quarter_no

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        5 AS sort_no,
        '合计' AS quarter,
        ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(qs.rent_received, 0.00)), 2) AS rent_received
    FROM quarters q
    LEFT JOIN quarter_stats qs
        ON q.quarter_no = qs.quarter_no
) t
ORDER BY sort_no;

        hr.housing_id,
        hr.end_time,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY hr.housing_id ORDER BY hr.end_time DESC, hr.id DESC) AS rn
    FROM qft_common_housing_renewal hr
    WHERE hr.company_id = 1001

      AND hr.business_type = 2
)
SELECT
    h.id AS housing_id,
    h.house_code,
    h.building,
    h.unit_name,
    GREATEST(
        COALESCE(t.hosting_end_time, '1900-01-01 00:00:00'),
        COALESCE(lhr.end_time, '1900-01-01 00:00:00')
    ) AS management_end_time,
    DATEDIFF(
        GREATEST(
            COALESCE(t.hosting_end_time, '1900-01-01 00:00:00'),
            COALESCE(lhr.end_time, '1900-01-01 00:00:00')
        ),
        CURDATE()
    ) AS days_to_expire
FROM qft_focus_housing h
JOIN qft_butler b
    ON b.housing_id = h.id
   AND b.businessType = 2
LEFT JOIN qft_focus_trust t
    ON h.trust_id = t.id
   AND t.housing_id = h.id
LEFT JOIN latest_housing_renewal lhr
    ON lhr.housing_id = h.id
   AND lhr.rn = 1
WHERE h.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND b.company_id = 1001
  AND h.is_check_out = 0
  AND GREATEST(
        COALESCE(t.hosting_end_time, '1900-01-01 00:00:00'),
        COALESCE(lhr.end_time, '1900-01-01 00:00:00')
      ) >= NOW()
  AND GREATEST(
        COALESCE(t.hosting_end_time, '1900-01-01 00:00:00'),
        COALESCE(lhr.end_time, '1900-01-01 00:00:00')
      ) <= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH)
ORDER BY management_end_time ASC, h.id ASC;

results.generated_sql:
WITH latest_tenant AS (
    SELECT housing_id, room_id, tenant_id, tenants_name, rent_price
    FROM (
        SELECT
            jr.housing_id,
            jt.room_id,
            jt.id AS tenant_id,
            jt.tenants_name,
            jt.lease_price AS rent_price,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                PARTITION BY jr.housing_id
                ORDER BY jt.create_time DESC, jt.id DESC
            ) AS rn
        FROM qft_joint_room jr
        JOIN qft_joint_tenants jt
          ON jt.room_id = jr.id
         AND jt.company_id = 1001
         AND IFNULL(jt.is_delete, 0) = 0
        WHERE jr.company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    ) t
    WHERE rn = 1
),
housing_profit AS (
    SELECT
        jh.id AS housing_id,
        jh.house_code,
        ap.property_adrr,
        ap.detail_address,
        jh.building,
        jh.unit_name,
        jh.door_number,
        jh.joe_price AS receive_price,
        lt.rent_price,
        ROUND(lt.rent_price - jh.joe_price, 2) AS price_diff
    FROM qft_joint_housing jh
    JOIN qft_butler b
      ON jh.salesman_id = b.id
     AND b.company_id = 1001
     AND b.businessType = 2
    LEFT JOIN qft_area_property ap
      ON jh.property_adrr = ap.id
     AND ap.company_id = 1001
     AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
    LEFT JOIN latest_tenant lt
      ON lt.housing_id = jh.id
    WHERE jh.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete, 0) = 0
)
SELECT
    housing_id,
    house_code,
    property_adrr,
    detail_address,
    building,
    unit_name,
    door_number,
    receive_price,
    rent_price,
    price_diff,
    CASE
        WHEN price_diff IS NOT NULL
         AND DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY price_diff DESC) = 1 THEN '是'
        ELSE '否'
    END AS is_max_profit
FROM housing_profit
ORDER BY price_diff DESC, housing_id ASC;

        CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), 'Q', q.quarter_no) AS quarter,
        IFNULL(a.rent_received_amount, 0.00) AS rent_received_amount
    FROM quarter_dim q
    LEFT JOIN rent_agg a
        ON q.quarter_no = a.quarter_no
)
SELECT
    quarter,
    rent_received_amount
FROM (
    SELECT
        quarter_no,
        quarter,
        rent_received_amount,
        1 AS sort_no
    FROM quarter_result

    SELECT
        99 AS quarter_no,
        '合计' AS quarter,
        ROUND(SUM(rent_received_amount), 2) AS rent_received_amount,
        2 AS sort_no
    FROM quarter_result
) t
ORDER BY sort_no, quarter_no;

WITH all_tenants AS (

    LEFT JOIN qft_area_property ap

       AND ap.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
    WHERE wt.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(wt.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND wt.lease_price IS NOT NULL

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        '合租' AS business_mode,
        jt.id AS tenant_id,
        jt.tenants_name,
        jt.phone,
        jt.lease_price AS monthly_rent,
        jh.house_code,
        jr.room_number,
        ap.property_adrr AS property_address,
        jh.door_number
    FROM qft_joint_tenants jt
    JOIN qft_joint_room jr
        ON jt.room_id = jr.id
       AND jr.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    JOIN qft_joint_housing jh
        ON jr.housing_id = jh.id
       AND jh.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete, 0) = 0
    LEFT JOIN qft_area_property ap
        ON jh.property_adrr = ap.id
       AND ap.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
    WHERE jt.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(jt.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND jt.lease_price IS NOT NULL
),
ranked AS (
    SELECT
        business_mode,
        tenant_id,
        tenants_name,
        phone,
        monthly_rent,
        house_code,
        room_number,
        property_address,
        door_number,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY business_mode ORDER BY monthly_rent DESC) AS max_rank,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY business_mode ORDER BY monthly_rent ASC) AS min_rank
    FROM all_tenants
),
extreme AS (
    SELECT
        business_mode,
        '最贵' AS rent_level,
        tenant_id,
        tenants_name,
        phone,
        monthly_rent,
        house_code,

    FROM ranked

        tenant_id,
        tenants_name,
        phone,
        monthly_rent,
        house_code,
        room_number,
        property_address,
        door_number
    FROM ranked
    WHERE min_rank = 1
)
SELECT
    business_mode,
    rent_level,
    tenant_id,
    tenants_name,
    phone,
    monthly_rent,
    house_code,
    room_number,
    property_address,
    door_number
FROM extreme
ORDER BY

SELECT
  w.whole_expend_arrears AS whole_expend_arrears,
  j.joint_income_arrears AS joint_income_arrears,
  w.whole_expend_arrears + j.joint_income_arrears AS total_arrears,
  CASE
    WHEN w.whole_expend_arrears > j.joint_income_arrears THEN '整租应支'
    WHEN w.whole_expend_arrears < j.joint_income_arrears THEN '合租应收'
    ELSE '一样多'
  END AS more_side,
  ABS(w.whole_expend_arrears - j.joint_income_arrears) AS arrears_diff

    FROM qft_joint_bill_expend jbe
    JOIN qft_joint_housing jh
      ON jbe.housing_id = jh.id
    JOIN qft_butler b
      ON jh.salesman_id = b.id
    WHERE jbe.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(jbe.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND jh.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND b.company_id = 1001
      AND b.businessType = 2
      AND IFNULL(jbe.is_history, 0) = 0
      AND COALESCE(jbe.arrear_money, 0) > 0
  ) w

      AND IFNULL(jti.is_delete, 0) = 0

      AND COALESCE(jti.debt_money, 0) > 0

        ELSE 0
    END AS is_top_total_flow_store
FROM (

        SUM(CASE WHEN r.focus_joint_mode = 3 THEN IFNULL(i.real_money, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS joint_rent_flow_amount,

    FROM qft_focus_tenants_income i
    INNER JOIN qft_focus_room r
        ON i.room_id = r.id
       AND r.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
    WHERE i.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(i.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(i.is_deposit, 0) = 0
      AND r.focus_joint_mode IN (2, 3)
    GROUP BY i.store_id
) sr
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT MAX(t.total_rent_flow_amount) AS max_total_rent_flow_amount
    FROM (
        SELECT
            i.store_id,
            SUM(CASE WHEN r.focus_joint_mode IN (2, 3) THEN IFNULL(i.real_money, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS total_rent_flow_amount
